arithmetic_failure: Checked overflow traps before any owner move, destruction, callback, or allocation commitment.
allocation_failure: OOM aborts; ValidDense and exact offered-owner accounting hold immediately before abort.
base_owner_result: No normal failure result; a caller requiring recovery must first use DENSE-TRY-RESERVE or DENSE-TRY-RESERVE-EXACT.
offered_owner_result: No normal failure result; no offered owner is read, moved, or destroyed before the pre-abort invariant.
last_recoverable_point: The separate try-reserve call returns before this mutator begins.
first_destructive_commit: Move the first SRC owner into DEST after capacity preparation.

offered_owner_result: No recoverable result; pre-abort owner accounting remains exact.
last_recoverable_point: NONE
first_destructive_commit: Install the first yielded owner in the new allocation.

arithmetic_failure: Returns CapacityError before any owner move, destruction, callback, or allocation commitment.
allocation_failure: Returns AllocationError before any owner move, destruction, callback, or old-allocation release.
base_owner_result: Returns the byte-identical logical BASE with the same root, version, len, capacity, order, borrows, and facts.
offered_owner_result: Returns every offered affine owner in its original role; no clone, destruction, or partial callback effect.
last_recoverable_point: Immediately after successful capacity acquisition and before the first destructive commit.
first_destructive_commit: Move the first SRC owner into DEST after capacity preparation.

unknown_length_rule: General unknown-length production cannot promise unchanged BASE after a late allocation failure. The recoverable variant therefore requires an exact checked upper bound before the first producer call; without one, this member remains construction-blocking.
